name: Payday Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the white sugar, brown sugar, and White Karo syrup.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches 245°F (117°C) on a candy thermometer.
3. Remove from heat and add the heavy cream and butter. Beat for as long as possible.
4. Add the chopped nuts to the mixture and continue beating until it is very stiff and creamy.
5. Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Let cool slightly before shaping into rolls or bars on the prepared surface.
7. Allow to set at room temperature for several hours, then refrigerate overnight if desired.
8. Optionally, roll in chopped salted peanuts for a larger Payday bar.
9. Wrap in plastic wrap and store until ready to serve.
